chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5453 of 2025 C.P. No.D-5456 of 2025 C.P. No.D-5457 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on Misc. No.22713/25 2.For order on office objection Nos. 1 to 3 3.For order on Misc. No.22714/25 4.For order on Misc. No.22715/25 5.For hg of main case 07.11.2025. Ms. Navin S. Merchant, advocate for petitioner in CP No.D-5453/2025. Dr. Shahab Imam, advocate for petitioners in CP Nos. D-5456 & 5457/2025. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. Petitioners are either medical universities or colleges, are about to give admissions to potential candidates either in MBBS or BDS programs. However, PM&DC has stopped their portals for admissions on one or the other reason mainly that in the inspection they were found lacking certain requirements. The case of the petitioners is that the criteria for the medical colleges and universities has been changed abruptly and they are required to obtain 90% score, whereas the previous requirement was only 70% which they had already met. It is further stated that abruptly stopping the portals of petitioners for admissions will harm their reputation and ruin them. Let notice be issued to respondents as well as learned Additional Attorney General for 02.12.2025. Meanwhile, the PM&DC shall open portals of the petitioners for admissions, till the next date of hearing. Office to place a copy of this order in connected petitions. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
